paper_record.title: \textit{Ab initio} \textit{GW}-BSE theory of optical activity in $α$-quartz
paper_record.abstract: We present an ab initio many-body theory of optical activity in solids within the GW-BSE framework. Dielectric spatial dispersion is formulated in two complementary forms: exciton envelope modulation and sum-over-exciton-states expansion. Our application to $α$-quartz reveals that the envelope-modulated formulation captures the low-frequency region, whereas the sum-over-exciton-states formulation is essential to reproduce the correct full frequency dependence. Comparisons with the independent-particle approximation and simple local-field corrections further highlight the decisive role of excitonic many-body effects in shaping the spectral dispersion of optical activity in solids.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 开发了基于 GW-BSE 的多体理论，实现了对 alpha-石英全频段光学活性的准确预测。
one_sentence_summary.en: Developed a GW-BSE many-body theory to accurately predict the full-frequency optical activity of alpha-quartz.

problem.zh: 长期以来，由于周期性边界条件下位置算符定义困难，难以准确预测固体（如 alpha-石英）的全频段光学旋转色散。
problem.en: Predicting the full-frequency optical rotatory dispersion of solids like alpha-quartz has been challenging due to the ill-defined position operator in periodic systems.

approach.zh: 在 GW-BSE 框架下，通过将介电函数对波矢进行一阶展开，提出了激子包络调制和激子态求和（SOXS）两种互补的计算表述。
approach.en: Expanding the GW-BSE dielectric function to first order in wavevector, using exciton envelope modulation and sum-over-exciton-states (SOXS) formulations.

main_takeaway.zh: 激子多体效应在决定固体光学活性的频谱色散中起关键作用，且 SOXS 表述对于捕捉全频段依赖性至关重要。
main_takeaway.en: Excitonic many-body effects are decisive for the spectral dispersion of optical activity, and the SOXS formulation is essential for capturing the correct frequency dependence.

why_it_matters.zh: 该工作解决了 alpha-石英光学活性预测的长期难题，为手性光电子材料的理性设计提供了高精度的理论工具。
why_it_matters.en: This work resolves a long-standing challenge in predicting alpha-quartz's optical activity and provides a high-precision tool for the rational design of chiroptoelectronic materials.

reason.zh: 首次在多体物理框架下实现了对 alpha-石英全频段光学活性的高精度预测，解决了该领域一个长期存在的计算难题。
reason.en: Achieved the first high-precision prediction of full-frequency optical activity in alpha-quartz using a many-body framework, resolving a long-standing computational challenge.

reason.zh: 论文解决了该领域一个具有两百年历史的原型材料计算难题，且采用了物理学界公认的高精度多体方法。
reason.en: The paper solves a long-standing problem in a prototypical material using state-of-the-art many-body methods.
